pages.title: EVgo | Electric Vehicle (EV) Charging Stations - EV Fast Chargers
pages.description: EVgo is one of the nation's largest public electric vehicle (EV) fast charging networks. Find 1,100+ fast charging stations across 47 states offering high-power chargers.
pages.content:
![Find Fast EV Chargers Near You](https://site-assets.evgo.com/f/78437/3840x2466/496b1dd7e3/hero-nationwide-charging-callout.jpg)

# Find Fast EV Chargers Near You

Download the EVgo App on iOS and Android

[![Apple App Store logo](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/evgo/id1281660968?mt=8)[![Get it on Google Play](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.driivz.mobile.android.evgo.driver&hl=en_US)

![EVgo Network Map](https://site-assets.evgo.com/f/78437/300x177/581544ee67/ir11-q3-25-network-map-101425.svg)

### Public Fast Charging for All

As one of the largest and most advanced EV fast charging networks nationwide, EVgo powers the freedom of movement with robust charging for all EV models. With over 1,200 public fast charging stations and multiple pricing plans, EVgo delivers speed, ease and convenience for EV drivers across the country. Today, more than 40% of the U.S. population lives within 10 miles of an EVgo fast charger, so it’s never been easier to power up with EVgo wherever you live, shop, work or travel.

[Find a ChargerFind a charger](https://www.evgo.com/find-a-charger)

## EVgo for Everyone

EVgo chargers are compatible with all fast-charge capable EVs. We are here for EV drivers, business owners, automakers, autonomous vehicle companies, rideshare drivers, and the list goes on!

![Fast Charging Station in Fairfield, Ohio](https://a.storyblok.com/f/78437/1920x1080/64650c6ea7/meijer-fairfield-evgo.jpg)

Business & Commercial

Attract customers by hosting fast charging stations on your property.

[Learn More](https://www.evgo.com/charging-solutions/business-and-commercial/)

![Fast Charging Station in Murrieta, CA](https://a.storyblok.com/f/78437/1138x753/896265f4d1/evgo-gm-2000-stall-small.jpg)

Automaker Partners

Partner with EVgo to design a charging solution that works for your organization.

[Learn More](https://www.evgo.com/charging-solutions/)

![Man and child charging Nissan Leaf at EVgo station](https://a.storyblok.com/f/78437/920x600/08831a6da7/man-child-charging-920x600.jpg)

Drivers

Charge with confidence at our 1,200+ stations across the U.S.

[Learn More](https://www.evgo.com/ev-drivers/)

## How to Charge

![How to Charge Step 1 Plug In](https://site-assets.evgo.com/f/78437/x/ffa1406d62/how-to-charge-01.svg)

#### Plug in

Connect to your charging port.

![How to Charge Step 2 Tap to Start Your Charge](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

#### Start Your Charge

By EVgo app, RFID, or credit card.

![How to Charge Step 3 Charge Up & Go](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

#### Charge Up & Go

Your next destination awaits.

[Learn MoreLearn more about how to charge your EV](https://www.evgo.com/ev-drivers/how-to-charge-your-ev/)

### EVgo’s Deep Industry Experience

![Industry leading experience](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

With 15 years of experience owning and operating one of the nation's largest public fast charging networks, EVgo is a first mover and industry leader in infrastructure deployment. We work with automakers, site hosts, businesses, rideshare operators, autonomous vehicle companies, utilities, and other stakeholders to accelerate nationwide expansion of fast charging infrastructure, making it easier and more convenient for EV drivers to charge when and where they like and need.

[Learn MoreLearn more about EVgo's industry experience](https://www.evgo.com/blog/)

![Industry leading experience](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

![EVgo Mobile App Screens](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

### Discover Chargers On-the-Go

- View real-time charger availability

- Monitor your charging session

- View session summary

- Charge seamlessly with Autocharge+


[![Download on the App Store](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/evgo/id1281660968?mt=8)[![Get it on Google Play](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.driivz.mobile.android.evgo.driver&hl=en_US)

## EVgo in the News

[View All News](https://www.evgo.com/news/)

[Read article "Uber Will Offer Incentives for E.V. Charger Construction"](https://www.evgo.com/news/uber-will-offer-incentives-for-ev-charger-construction/)

![Uber Will Offer Incentives for E.V. Charger Construction](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Feb 18, 2026news

### Uber Will Offer Incentives for E.V. Charger Construction

The company said it would encourage companies that operated chargers to install them in neighborhoods where its drivers lived and work.

Read More

[Read article "US EV Drivers Have a Wealth of Fast Charger Options"](https://www.evgo.com/news/us-ev-drivers-have-a-wealth-of-fast-charger-options/)

![US EV Drivers Have a Wealth of Fast Charger Options](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Jan 29, 2026news

### US EV Drivers Have a Wealth of Fast Charger Options

The time it takes to fuel an electric vehicle, long a stumbling block to EV adoption, is shrinking in the US, as more capable cars and trucks plug into a rash of new, high-speed charging machines.

Read More

[Read article "EVgo bets on NACS as Tesla’s charging port takes over US EVs"](https://www.evgo.com/news/evgo-bets-on-nacs-as-teslas-charging-port-takes-over-us-evs/)

![EVgo bets on NACS as Tesla’s charging port takes over US EVs](<Base64-Image-Removed>)

Jan 27, 2026news

### EVgo bets on NACS as Tesla’s charging port takes over US EVs

EVgo is betting big on Tesla’s charging standard. After a 2025 pilot that put nearly 100 NACS connectors online across 22 major metro areas, the public fast-charging provider says it plans to scale quickly, with more than 500 NACS connectors expected to be installed by the end of this year at both existing sites and new locations.

Read More
